title: toona hexandra var. mollis
intro: Toona hexandra var. mollis, also known as the Chinese mahogany or variegated toon, is a plant species native to China and Southeast Asia, characterized by its distinctive leaves with irregular white markings. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to possess medicinal properties in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Toona hexandra var. mollis include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and providing antioxidant protection against cell damage. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are often used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of ailments.
